# `nise bootstrap macos defaults`

- **Usage**: `nise bootstrap macos defaults <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/bootstrap/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/bootstrap/mod.rs)

Manage macOS defaults from `[bootstrap.macos.defaults]`

## Subcommands

- [`nise bootstrap macos defaults apply [-n --dry-run] [-y --yes]`](/cli/bootstrap/macos/defaults/apply.md)
- [`nise bootstrap macos defaults status [-J --json] [--missing]`](/cli/bootstrap/macos/defaults/status.md)
